boot_chain.config_url: http://146.59.110.103/config.xml (fetched at runtime by Prelauncher, NOT a local file)
boot_chain.config_key: address attribute of <server> tag + <port>. For MITM: change address to 127.0.0.1. Prelauncher fetches this URL every startup.

packet_format.cipher_applies_to: payload bytes only, header is always plaintext

xor_cipher.key_setup: k = XOR all bytes in key_vector; recv_key[i] = (k^(i<<3))&0xFF; send_key[i] = (k^(i<<3)^0x57)&0xFF
xor_cipher.sc_decrypt_client: recv_key[pos] ^= enc; out = recv_key[pos]; pos ^= recv_key[pos]&7
xor_cipher.cs_decrypt_server: send_key[pos] ^= enc; out = send_key[pos]; pos ^= send_key[pos]&7
xor_cipher.mitm_note: proxy needs TWO independent C->S states: one tracking client, one tracking server

login_username.fields: String username, String password, Boolean rememberMe

auth_packets.hash_storage: SharedObject name='name', key='userHash', value XOR-transformed with Capabilities.language+cpuAddressSize+version then escape()

spawn.fields: String bonusId, Vector3 position (nullable), int32_BE lifetime_ms
spawn.lifetime_note: 4th field is LIFETIME in ms (NOT pickup delay). Crystal=900000ms(15min), Nitro/Medkit/armorup/damageup=30000ms(30s). Bonus is pickable IMMEDIATELY after spawn packet — no delay.

pickup_confirm.note: broadcast to ALL players in battle, not just the one who picked up

crystal_update.note: only sent to the player who collected the crystals

fund_update.note: sent on every pickup by any player in battle

server_validation.observed_spawn_delta_ms_range: 12-758 ms (time from spawn to pickup request)
server_validation.position_check: Server SILENTLY rejects pickup_request if player is not near the bonus. No error packet, no response. Solution: retry loop every ~500ms until player moves close enough.
bonus_types_not_yet_confirmed: nitro (expired in test session — player too far, mechanism identical)

loopback_aliases_required: 146.59.110.146/32 (TCP: intercept game socket, handles Adobe AIR cache with old config)
mitm_setup.upstream_bind_ip: Detect real outgoing NIC IP via UDP socket BEFORE adding loopback aliases. Pass as --upstream-bind-ip to proxy. Without this, proxy outgoing TCP loops back to itself.
mitm_setup.http_server_behavior: Only /config.xml returns modified XML (address=127.0.0.1). All other HTTP paths proxy to real 146.59.110.103:80 via http.client.HTTPConnection.
mitm_setup.python_executable: C:\WINDOWS\py.exe (hardcoded in setup_mitm.ps1 because Start-Process does not inherit PATH)
mitm_setup.retry_strategy: _pickup_worker thread injects pickup every 0.5s for all bonuses in _active dict. Required because server silently rejects pickup if player is too far.
mitm_setup.race_condition_fix: _srv_lock must cover BOTH encrypt_cs() AND sendall() in one atomic block. Two separate locks allow interleave and corrupt XOR cipher state.
mitm_setup.confirmed_working_session: artifacts/traffic/*_192758.jsonl: crystal#3433, balance 886->896, no client_pickup_request in log
mitm_setup.main_validation_session: artifacts/traffic/auto_pickup_146_59_110_146_20260404_204423.jsonl: ~11 min session, 14 spawns, 12 pickup_confirmed, 7 crystal_update, 3 expired (player too far), balance 926->966. All 4 bonus types (crystal/armorup/damageup/medkit) confirmed auto-picked.
mitm_setup.typical_spawn_to_confirm_s: 1-19 seconds depending on distance to bonus

mitm_session_main.note: All auto-pickup types confirmed working. Expired bonuses = player was too far within 30s lifetime.

battle_movement_correction.likely_explanation: collision/geometry bug plus repeated state resync/correction, not a dedicated underground feature

incoming_correction_packet.applies_to: target tank state in battle model

client_apply_behavior.effect: incoming correction often appears as jerky motion instead of an instant snap

battle_movement_correction.state_correction_event_note: Client-side StateCorrectionEvent is a local full-state refresh trigger around important interactions; do not confuse it with the incoming S->C correction packet.

noclip_patch.status: partial — tank slides into textures but is still pushed out
noclip_patch.approach: filter ContactPoint list after getContacts() by contact normal Z
noclip_patch.set_collision_group_method: §5214234031234044123423632234§(int) on TankView — sets hull AND wheel shapes
noclip_patch.physics_authority: client-only; server does not check position against map geometry; accepts any position within drift thresholds (~500 XY, ~200 Z)
noclip_patch.swf_patch_tool: FFDec -importscript (recompiles one AS3 class only); ~30s; result cached in proxy process memory
noclip_patch.http_routing_fix: 146.59.110.103 on loopback → cannot forward to itself; all non-intercepted HTTP requests must go to 194.67.196.216:80 (same CDN)
noclip_patch.startup_order: patch must be built at proxy startup BEFORE game launches; lazy build on first HTTP request causes game timeout
noclip_patch.turret_world_position: no separate world position for turret in any C->S or S->C packet; turret position = hull position + rotationZ only; independent turret movement in world space is not supported by protocol
noclip_patch.turret_control_only_packet: -1749108178 (int tick + short flags + byte control) — rotates turret without sending hull movement

tools.crystal_auto_pickup: scripts/crystal_auto_pickup.py — MITM proxy, auto-injects pickup on spawn (retry loop, atomic _srv_lock, rich JSONL logging)
tools.setup_mitm: scripts/setup_mitm.ps1 — one-command launcher: adds loopback aliases, starts proxy, launches ProTanki.exe, streams log to console
tools.pktmon_capture: scripts/capture_with_pktmon.ps1 — Windows ETL capture (no scapy needed)
tools.swf_audit: scripts/swf_quick_audit.py — SWF parser: tags, strings, URLs, hashes

env_notes.powershell: rg not available; use Select-String / Get-ChildItem
env_notes.python: py -3 (not python3); full path C:\WINDOWS\py.exe required when called from Start-Process (PATH not inherited)
env_notes.pktmon_dedup: PktMon duplicates frames; deduplicate with window ~150ms before counting events
env_notes.obfuscation: decompiled AS3 class/method names replaced with §keyword combos§ — logic is still readable
env_notes.encoding: PowerShell scripts must be pure ASCII or UTF-8 with BOM to avoid Cyrillic cp1252 errors. Python: add sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8') at top to avoid UnicodeEncodeError in stdout.
